sections.title: Fuego on Wheels
sections.subtitle: Texas BBQ & Tex-Mex smashups — find us around Austin

sections.caption: Friday night on South Congress — the line starts early

sections.text: I've been chasing this truck for two years. The brisket taco alone is worth it. Worth. It.

sections.body: We park where the people are. Brisket tacos, smoked elote, rotating specials every week. Location drops on Instagram by 10am. Available for private events and food truck rallies — minimum 50 guests.
